name: Teamway International Group Holdings Limited
summary: Teamway International Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, designs, manufactures, and sells packaging products and structural components in the People's Republic of China. The company offers expanded polystyrene and expanded polyolefin products for packaging consumer electrical appliances, such as televisions, refrigerators, air conditioners, washing machines, water heaters, information technology products, and others. It is also involved in the property investment and money lending businesses. The company was formerly known as Jin Bao Bao Holdings Limited and changed its name to Teamway International Group Holdings Limited in September 2017. Teamway International Group Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong.
